full_text:
Final table with antibody dilution and exposure times:

Cycle | Antibody | Dilution | Exposure | Comment
Cycle 1 | CD14 with secondaries (488) | 1:100 (primary unconjugated + 1:2000 secondaries) | 0.1 | 
Cycle 1 | PanCK | 1:200 | 0.03 | 
Cycle 1 | CD45 | 1:100 | 0.125 | 
Cycle 2 | CD15 | 1:30 | 0.2 | 
Cycle 2 | PD-L1 | 1:100 | 0.2 | Didn't work or not expressed
Cycle 2 | HLA-A | 1:100 | 0.01 | Lower cocn!
Cycle 2 | Vimentin-750 | 1:100 | 0.2 | 
Cycle 3 | CD163 | 1:100 | 0.15 | 
Cycle 3 | CD11b | 1:100 | 0.3 | Few cells, could be overexposed
Cycle 3 | PD-1 | 1:100 | 0.175 | perfect
Cycle 4 | Annexin A2 | 1:100 | 0.2 | Spin 10 mins before usage
Cycle 4 | pSTAT1 | 1:50 | 0.2 | 
Cycle 4 | CD8a | 1:50 | 0.1 | Overexposed, use lower conc
Cycle 5 | TIM-3 | 1:200 | 0.125 | 
Cycle 5 | PAX8 | 1:300 | 0.2 | Didn't work in S107 sample, conc should be higher
Cycle 5 | HLA-DBP1 | 1:300 | 0.05 | Conc can be lower
Cycle 6 | IBA-1 | 1:200 | 0.1 | 
Cycle 6 | Ki-67 (555) | 1:200 | 0.075 | 
Cycle 6 | CD206 | 1:200 | 0.025 | Conc should be lower
Cycle 7 | CD4 | 1:150 | 0.175 | 
Cycle 7 | CD11c | 1:150 | 0.1 | 
Cycle 7 | p21 | 1:200 | 0.1 |
